natural_chinese_context: 我对着扫地机器人喊，但它没理我。
reference_english_alternatives: I shouted at the vacuum, but it didn't respond.
The cleaning machine didn't listen when I spoke to it.
_scenario_topic: Trying to get a robot vacuum's attention by speaking to it
